sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: PFIZER INC의 공시 핵심을 한국어로 요약했습니다.

keyPoints.text: 1분기 총매출이 144억 5,100만 달러로 전년 동기 137억 1,500만 달러 대비 5% 증가했습니다.
출시 및 인수 제품군의 운영 매출이 전년 대비 22% 성장했습니다.
보고 기준 희석 EPS는 0.47달러, 조정 희석 EPS는 0.75달러였습니다.

riskChanges.text: 보고 기준 희석 EPS가 0.47달러로 전년 동기 대비 10% 감소하는 가운데 조정 기준과의 실적 격차가 지속되고 있습니다.

businessChanges.text: 글로벌 바이오제약 사업부 내 상업 조직을 재편하여 오프패턴트 브랜드 제품 포트폴리오를 통합했습니다.
약 20개 핵심 피벗 연구 시작 계획과 함께 후기 단계 임상 파이프라인이 긍정적 성과를 보고했습니다.
CFO는 글로벌 상업 실행력과 운영 효율성 집중이 분기 성과를 견인했다고 밝혔습니다.

financialHighlights.text: 조정 순이익은 42억 9,000만 달러로 전년 동기 52억 3,700만 달러 대비 감소했습니다.
보고 기준 순이익은 26억 8,700만 달러로 전년 동기 29억 6,700만 달러 대비 9% 감소했습니다.
2026년 연간 가이던스 매출 상단 625억 달러, 조정 희석 EPS 2.80달러~3.00달러를 재확인했습니다.

watchItems.text: 보고 기준 순이익 9% 감소와 조정 기준 간 간극이 크므로 비반복 항목 영향에 대한 지속적 모니터링이 필요합니다.
출시·인수 제품군 22% 운영 매출 성장의 지속 여부와 약 20개 피벗 연구 결과가 중장기 성장의 핵심 분수령입니다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: g Pfizer Reports Strong First-Quarter Results And Reaffirms 2026 Guidance ■ Earnings Driven by Focused Execution and 22% Op Revenue Growth of Launched and Acquired Products (1) ■ Pipeline Momentum Builds on Positive Phase 3 and Mid-Stage Readouts ■ Robust Late‑Stage R&D Pipeline, On Track to Start ~20 Key Pivotal Studies in 2026 NEW YORK, Tuesday, May 5, 2026 — Pfizer Inc. (NYSE: PFE) reported financial results for the first quarter of 2026 and reaffirmed its full-year 2026 financial guidance (2) . EXECUTIVE COMMENTARY Dr. Albert Bourla, Chairman and CEO of Pfizer: “We're off to a strong start in 2026, and it reinforces our confidence that we will successfully navigate this defining period for Pfizer. Our R&D pipeline is advancing on multiple fronts – with positive Phase 3 readouts and encouraging mid-stage results building meaningful momentum – and I'm particularly encouraged by what we

're seeing in oncology and obesity, two areas where I believe Pfizer is positioned to lead.” David Denton, CFO and EVP of Pfizer: “Our first-quarter results are attributable to our solid commercial performance globally as well as our ongoing focus on operational efficiency. This quarter, I’m particularly pleased with the 22% year-over-year operational revenue growth from our launched and acquired products (1) . Today, we are reaffirming our full-year 2026 financial guidance.” OVERALL RESULTS ■ First-Quarter 2026 Revenues of $14.5 Billion, Representing 2% Year-over-Year Operational Growth – Excluding Contributions from Comirnaty and Paxlovid, Revenues Grew 7% Operationally – Revenues of Launched and Acquired Products (1) Grew 22% Operationally ■ First-Quarter 2026 Reported (3) Diluted EPS of $0.47, and Adjusted (4) Diluted EPS of $0.75 ■ Reaffirms All Components of Full-Year 2026 Financ  Normalized numeric aliases: $14.5 Billion = 145억 달러; $14.5 = 14.5달러; $0.47 = 0.47달러; $0.75 = 0.75달러.

l Guidance (2) , including Revenues in a Range of $59.5 to $62.5 Billion and Adjusted (4) Diluted EPS in a Range of $2.80 to $3.00 - 1 - Beginning in the first quarter of 2026, we made organizational changes in our commercial organization within the Global Biopharmaceuticals Business (Biopharma) to better support and optimize performance across our product portfolios. These changes include the transition of certain off-patent branded and generic sterile injectables and biosimilars primarily from the Specialty Care and Oncology product portfolios to a new Hospital and Biosimilars product portfolio and the creation of a new Global Hospital and Biosimilars Division within Biopharma. See the Item 1. Business––Commercial Operations section of Pfizer's 2025 Annual Report on Form 10-K (available at www.pfizer.com and www.sec.gov). Some amounts in this press release may not add  Normalized numeric aliases: $62.5 Billion = 625억 달러; $59.5 = 59.5달러; $62.5 = 62.5달러; $2.80 = 2.80달러; $3.00 = 3.00달러.

All percentages have been calculated using unrounded amounts. References to operational variances pertain to period-over-period changes that exclude the impact of foreign exchange rates (5) . Results for the first quarter of 2026 and 2025 (6) are summarized below. ($ in millions, except per share amounts) First-Quarter 2026 2025 % Change Revenues $ 14,451 $ 13,715 5% Reported (3) Net Income 2,687 2,967 (9%) Reported (3) Diluted EPS 0.47 0.52 (10%) Adjusted (4) Income 4,290 5,237 (18%) Adjusted (4) Diluted EPS 0.75 0.92 (18%) REVENUES ($ in millions) First-Quarter 2026 2025 % Change Total Oper. Global Biopharmaceuticals Business (Biopharma) $ 14,161 $ 13,441 5% 2% Pfizer Cent  Normalized numeric aliases: $59.5 = 59.5달러; $62.5 = 62.5달러; 14,451 million = 144억 5,100만 달러; 13,715 million = 137억 1,500만 달러; 2,687 million = 26억 8,700만 달러; 2,967 million = 29억 6,700만 달러; 4,290 million = 42억 9,000만 달러; 5,237 million = 52억 3,700만 달러; 13,441 million = 134억 4,100만 달러; 14,161 million = 141억 6,100만 달러.
